# Clean DAE note

## Definition

A clean atomic note explains one durable idea in plain language and keeps the
claim small enough to test against examples.

## Analogy

It is like labeling one jar in a pantry instead of writing a recipe across every
container.

## Example

A note about "good atomic note quality" names the quality, shows a useful
contrast, and links to [[Atomic Note Quality]] for review context.

## Links

- [[Atomic Note Quality]]

## Sources

- Synthetic fixture handbook, 2026.
